assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable/payable is a recognised monetary item denominated in a currency that gives rise to foreign exchange gains or losses that are not fully eliminated on consolidation.
The foreign currency risk component is separately identifiable and reliably measurable, and the hedge relationship would meet the normal IFRS 9 documentation and effectiveness requirements.

approaches.label: Hedge of the foreign currency risk component of the intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: This is a genuine hedge designation route because IFRS 9 permits the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item in consolidated financial statements and also permits designation of only a specific risk component.
